case_title: JIALIANG DONG VS. ELDON J BRAUN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONG, JIALIANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRAUN, ELDON J DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING.
